MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN Clerk: Jacque Willis-McGhee Reporter: A. HOWELL, #2532

C/C FOR UD TRIAL PROVE-UP; PLTF PRESENT W/COUNSEL JOHN PHELPS, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER; STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMT STATED FOR THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS;
DEFT TO SURRENDER POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 301 WALLER STREET ON OR BEFORE 5/14/2011 AT 5PM; DEFT WAIVES ALL RIGHTS & CLAIMS; IF TIMELY SURRENDER OF PREMISES PLTF WILL WAIVE ALL RENTS/DAMAGES FROM 12/1/10 THRU 5/14/11; DEFT FULLY RELEASES A& WAIVES ALL CAUSES OF ACTION BY PLTF KNOWN & UNKNOWN, INCLUDING SECURITY DEPOSIT; FAILURE TO COMPLY, PLTF W/24HRS NOTICE WILL BE ENTITLED TO JUDGMT INCLUDING MONETARY JUDGMENT; TIMELY SURRENDER PLTF THRU COUNSEL WILL FILE A DISMISSAL; PLTF WILL GIVE DEFT A NEUTRAL LETTER OF REFERENCE; PLTF WILL PAY DEFT THE SUM OF $400. PER WEEK IF DEFT VACATES PRIOR TO 5/14/11

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2011 Continued To Feb-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Michael Phelps, Esq. for and with Plaintiff Brenda Buckner.
Aaron Farmer, Esq. as counsel for and with Defendant K. Bradly Reeves.
The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schireiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.
Case did not settled, the trial date confirmed.
